column11: 8-yr ex-Beachbody coach (built 'Team Run the World'); BODi axed the MLM model Dec 2024 — now independent run coach + affiliate, no new MLM; strong builder DNA; RRCA run coach (not clinical/doctor). Fitness/running niche, not clean-living.
column12: Hi Nicole — I read your 'No More Beachbody' post; eight years building something real and then the model just dissolves under you. I work with women who've already done direct sales and know the grind, but want an established American company with real products people already buy every day — and repeat income that doesn't reset when a corporate office changes its mind. Not starting over, not an MLM-rebuild. If you're even quietly open to it, worth 15 minutes on Zoom to compare notes? No pressure either way. — Shannon
